reviews.review_description: This gets the job done for what it promises, some fun riding, fairly immersive, good speed sensation, and decent challenges. The graphics are acceptable, though of course would benefit from being better and having more interesting landscapes. I don't feel like there's a lot of consistency as to when I rin into a car versus when I am able to get by them and near miss, sometimes it feels like the game's judgment is incorrect on that. I feel like I bought this on sale for a dollar or two and it is worth that.  Would be a steal for free, and would be overpaying at $4-$5

developer_response.body: Hey Tecmo, thanks for the review! This game was done like 3 years ago, so we had our minimum req as the S6, that is one of the reasons that we needed to have so simple environments and could not make more complex graphics. Take a look on Ricoshooter, our latest game, we could work the graphics ups. I will ask the team to check again this collisions problems, they should be concise.

reviews.review_description: I love the game. But there are two bugs. First sometimes in a curve this never end, it is random. And second and more important fix level 21, i cant start it. Played in Oculus Go.

developer_response.body: Hey man, thanks for the awesome complements! I will looking into this problems, in fact there is no level 21, you just went above all our expectations and finished a level that should be impossible! Hold on for new levels ;)

reviews.review_description: I build and ride bikes and this game is a cracker. Well done it's like ya in road rash. Got this headset a yr ago  and there wasn't many good games just experiences so big up to all the developers etc woohooo the handling using headset and remote is spot on could do with some bends and dips in road if old roadrash technology could do it surely you bright folks could??  Just a thought like I said smashing game

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! We would love to see the bikes you build and hope you enjoy this game a lot! We are working on creating some bends, it is working for the remaster version for PC, we are working hard to see if the Mobile can handle the calculations ;)

reviews.review_description: Just a unique experience in vr riding game!! Fast tracking scroll,  nice graphic,  and powerful rock'n'roll soundtrack!!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! We loved that you liked, just a heads up, you gave 3 stars, not sure if this is what you meant ;)

reviews.review_description: It's good and you must play

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for this feedback! We really appreciate it and hope you had a great time!

reviews.review_description: Love how I dont get sick when riding the bike! The sensation of speed is amazing, hope to see more levels soon!
1euros 99 for  this game at a price of the fuel right now it s better than i was expected

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! BTW, you don't spend gas while playing it, so it is a double win!

reviews.review_description: It's quite good, the track gets a bit monotonous as it's straight. Once you get used to it difficulty drops considerably and it gets a, little bit boring though I'm sure it will improve!

developer_response.body: Thanks Mac! We are working to make it curve, as much as you progress it gets hard to control faster bikes! Hope you enjoy it!

reviews.review_description:
Nice little motorbike racer.
It would be cool to have more goals that you have to complete in each level to actually pass it though....  like, near miss 5 cars, only overtake on the right hand side until the first checkpoint, reach a high speed of 200kmph.

Maybe having to complete 2/3 goals to best the level.

Maybe it does that in later levels though, I haven't played much of it yet. It would also be cool to actually be able to look down and see your body and arms especially...the actual bike, rather than just the handle bars.

It is a lot of fun to play though!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Very glad that you liked. I loved the idea of mixed goals, and something like a star rating for each race. I will talk to the team and see if we can do that! There is a nice update coming up that will add blends to the game. But, I do believe you can see the entire bike under yourself, we don't put a default body on it, but the bike is there under you. (a remaster version for Rift with 6dof makes very easy to see this :D)

reviews.review_description:
Well done but boring after a few minutes.

UPDATE:
Yes! Curves, bends, slopes, terrain, dirt roads, different sceneries, a lot less points needed to upgrade the bikes... All that or some of that would improve the game imho.

developer_response.body: Thanks Mike, do you think some blends/curves or other environments would make the game less boring?

reviews.review_description: I don't like the crash visuals.

developer_response.body: Congratz on Overtake, is indeed a great game. I must say they are really different, since you cannot look back when driving in Overtake, and here the idea is to give freedom to the player. Also, tilt the head to control a bike makes more sense compared to a car ;)

reviews.review_description: This game is awesome! Great graphics and easy to maneuver! You'll play this time and time, again! My new "go to"!

developer_response.body: Great to know that you are enjoying the game! Let us know if you "finish it"!
Thanks for the review hope you liked the game!

reviews.review_description: Good game.  I like the motor cycle.  I wish there were more options and the controls didn’t mess with the alignment

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! When you mean more options, you wanted more bikes? Please contact us through Facebook so we can try to aid you properly! Cheers

reviews.review_description: Graphics are absolutely terrible.  I don't even understand the other reviews.

developer_response.body: Hi man, can you please contact us on Facebook so we can understand if there is any problem on your version. The graphics are not that great, as been a porting from a mobile game, but it should not be that terrible :(.

reviews.review_description: Great game good graphics paid 49cents what a steal

developer_response.body: Glad that you got it in a sale ;)
